creator: achilov-rn@askd.ru
text:
amarok need ruby. But amarok need it only for some secondary and useless
(for me) components. I have spent some time, dig amarok sources and produce
patch to switch off ruby dependency. This patch is dirty, real way should
correct amarok configure script.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to install amarok and notify, that it need ruby...
